name: domacinko
description: Domaćinko — AI pomoćnik za domaćinstvo (PWA + Android)

scripts.cap:sync: npm run prepare:www && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:copy: npm run prepare:www && npx cap copy android
scripts.cap:add: npm run prepare:www && npx cap add android
scripts.build:android: npm run cap:sync && node -e "console.log('\nSledeći korak: npm run cap:open  →  Build → Build APK(s) u Android Studio\nAPK: android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk')"
